tax: Proto-Elementals is placed at species rank beneath (inferred stem) ((stem) order, True Elementals class). Diagnosis rests on the shared elemental properties — single-element commitment, pressure-formation, medium-failure — projected back to an uncommitted root. It is separated from its sibling the four committed classes by its uncommitted matrix versus the fixed single-element body of every observed elemental; the two share the genus body-plan but never the committed single element. Composition, not colour or menace, fixes the placement: an inferred uncommitted elemental matrix.
ap: Proto-Elementals stands unknown; inferred, never measured. Its silhouette is reconstructed as an unstable matrix prior to elemental commitment. Three diagnostic surface markers separate it in the field: no field marker; the entry is a reconstruction; inferred instability, resolving toward one element under local pressure; and shared traits projected from the four classes rather than observed. It moves with not observed, and shows not observed. Even after dispersal it can be identified from none; the taxon is theorised from shared properties, not from remains, so a survey team need not see the living body to log the species.
eco: Proto-Elementals persists in no habitat; the form is inferred as the common state prior to the earth/fire/water/air divergence. It does not breed; it forms where theorised to arise where raw elemental pressure has not yet committed to one element, and recurs whenever not observed; inferred to resolve immediately into a committed class. It sustains its mass on raw uncommitted elemental pressure, drawing in inferred to draw on whatever element it resolves toward. Range is bounded by not applicable: outside that band the body theorised to collapse into a committed element rather than persist. Juvenile or nascent forms appear as not observed, which lets a surveyor predict where an adult will rise.
beh: Behaviour is the behaviour of its medium given intent. Proto-Elementals is roused by local elemental pressure, inferred to force commitment and otherwise lies not observed. It claims not applicable and answers intrusion with inferred to resolve toward the locally dominant element. Toward grey-folk it is never encountered; a reconstruction only; survey crews report that Stonesong Heralds treat it as a teaching figure, not a field hazard. It is not cultural and keeps no craft — its 'decisions' are thresholds of pressure, heat, current, or charge, not plans.
traitsText: Stable characters of Proto-Elementals: a body of an inferred uncommitted elemental matrix; inferred resistance to disruption only until it commits; and a defining weakness — inferred instability forcing rapid commitment to one element. Its senses run through the medium itself: not observed. It tolerates not applicable but fails at commitment to a single element. Mass varies with available element, yet the proportions, the uncommitted matrix posited as the shared root, stay constant, which is why mass alone never reclassifies the taxon.
abilities: Abilities of Proto-Elementals are bounded by its anatomy, not borrowed from other elements: inferred capacity to resolve toward any one element; no observed bounded abilities; inferred to express the resolving element's powers once committed; and none recorded. Each is a direct expression of raw uncommitted elemental pressure, so it cannot, for instance, be collected, measured, or confirmed as a living body. The powers scale with body mass and fade as the body disperses.
bg: In the Throat, Proto-Elementals matters because it organises the four classes under one inferred root without claiming a specimen exists. Grey-folk survey practice treats it as an inferred orphan stem retained for comparison, not a field taxon, and its presence reshapes routes through no routes; it is a reconstruction in the index. It is marked theorised — no specimen — and kept as an accepted inferred orphan rather than a collected elemental.
g: Proto-Elementals (Primordia elementalis) is the theorised undifferentiated ancestor-state from which the four elemental classes are inferred to diverge. Documented from no living specimen; inferred from shared elemental properties, it expresses a single inner element as its whole anatomy — an undifferentiated elemental matrix not yet committed to earth, fire, water, or air — rather than as flesh laid over an animal skeleton. It is retained as an inferred orphan, not a collected body: a reconstruction from what all true elementals share. Field teams record it as a true elemental, not a beast wearing mineral armour: when it disperses it leaves none observed; the form is theorised, not recorded and no carcass.
